text.tspan: Number of people with extensively drug resistant tuberculosis, 2021

Estimated number of people with
extensively drug resistant tuberculosis
.
Data source: IHME, Global Burden of Disease (2024)
Note: Data includes tuberculosis cases in HIV -negative people. Tuberculosis cases among people with HIV are classified under HIV/AIDS
